title: feat: dashboard CLI + render performance
body:
## Summary

This PR adds a `widgetctl --port 9000` CLI for launching the dashboard. It also adds a new `Widget.render_html` method and adds tests covering the new render path. The PR removes the deprecated `legacy_render` helper. Importantly, this PR introduces **no telemetry**.

## Notes

- Performance: render is now 3x faster on the bench.
- Adds WIDGETLIB_DEBUG=1 flag for verbose logging.
